title: Floating Action Button

statement.markdown:
## Floating Action Button Challenge
Create a floating action button that stays at the bottom right of the screen, regardless of the screen size. The button should have a white background with a green plus icon.

constraints: The floating action button should be placed at the bottom right of the screen.
The floating action button should remain visible across different screen sizes.
The button should have a white background with a green plus icon.
